name: Carmel Fudge Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Pkg chocolate cake mix (18 ¼ oz)
1 Can Eagle Brand condensed milk (not evaporated!)
recipeInstructions:
1. Reheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare the cake mix according to the package directions.
3. Pour 2 cups of batter into a greased 13x9-inch baking pan and bake for 15 minutes.
4. In a heavy saucepan, melt the caramels and margarine over low heat.
5. Remove from heat; stir in the condensed milk until well combined.
6. Spread the caramel mixture evenly over the cake.
7. Spread any remaining cake batter over the caramel.
8. Top with chopped pecans.
9. Bake for an additional 30 minutes, or until the cake springs back when lightly touched.
10. Allow to cool.
